whatsapp_message: Hi! I hope you and your family are doing well. I wanted to touch base about your child's recent progress in our program. We've noticed their attendance has dipped a bit lately and they haven't been as active with practice questions. We believe in their potential and want to support them fully. Could we arrange a brief conversation this week to discuss how we can help? Your partnership means so much to us. Looking forward to hearing from you soon!

Hello! I hope all is well. I wanted to reach out about your child's progress. They've been attending classes regularly, which is wonderful! However, we've noticed they're completing very few practice questions at home. Practice is really important for reinforcing what they learn in class. I'd love to talk with you this week about how we can encourage more practice time. Perhaps we can identify any challenges and find solutions together. Looking forward to connecting with you soon. Thank you!

Hi! I hope you and your family are doing well. I'm reaching out because while your child has been attending classes regularly, we've noticed a slight decline in their overall engagement recently. We want to catch this early and provide any support they might need. I'd love to have a brief chat with you this week to discuss how we can keep them motivated and on track. Your child is doing well, and together we can make sure they continue to excel. Please let me know when works for you!

I'd love to work together to help get them back on track. Please let me know what works best for you. Thank you!
